page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 processor. It features 8 physical cores and 8 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz, supported by a 33 MB L3 cache. The system is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes 959 GB of local SSD storage. Network connectivity is rated at a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations indicate that the ecs.i2g.2xlarge delivers modest processing performance. Single-core and multi-core CPU metrics from stress-ng and Geekbench place the instance in the lower 25% tier. Memory read bandwidth is also relatively low, though uncached write bandwidth and PassMark CPU extended instructions achieve average tier results. Redis SET operations perform at an average level of 5.98 million operations per second, while static web serving and database operations fall into the lower performance brackets.

The inclusion of 959 GB of local SSD storage provides a consolidated hardware footprint, reducing the need for external block storage attachments. However, the trade-off lies in its older Intel Xeon processor architecture, which yields lower compute and memory throughput compared to modern hardware classes. This server is best suited for general-purpose workloads, local file caching, development environments, and lightweight database applications that benefit from local SSD storage but do not require high-frequency CPU performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz, 32.0 GB of RAM, and 959 GB of bundled local SSD storage. Operating on the KVM hypervisor with an x86_64 architecture, it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate modest processing capabilities, with stress-ng and Geekbench scores placing the instance in the lower quartile, though it maintains average performance in Redis SET operations and PassMark CPU extended instruction tests. The integrated local SSD storage offers resource density, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring local storage without high compute demands. The ecs.i2g.2xlarge is suited for general-purpose applications, development environments, and lightweight database hosting.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.2xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 959 GB of bundled local SSD storage, suitable for general-purpose and storage-focused workloads.

tagline: A dedicated general-purpose server featuring integrated local SSD storage and balanced memory allocation for standard workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs at 2.5 GHz
32.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
959 GB of bundled local SSD storage
Best suited for general-purpose applications and development environments
